proceedings.title: What does your client want legal aid for?

search.label: Search for legal proceedings
search.hint: Select one proceeding at a time.

radio.hint: You will only be shown the proceedings that can be added to ones you have already selected.

search.hint: Select one authority at a time.

radio.hint: You will only be shown authorities that can be added.
